    static Map<Urn,ReferenceIdCi>
    SdkHelper.parseCompetitorsReferences(List<com.sportradar.uf.sportsapi.datamodel.SapiTeam> competitors, Map<Urn,ReferenceIdCi> currentCompetitorsReferences)
    Get competitor reference from a list of competitors Note: reference must be checked and updated, since it is not sure that references on summary are the same as on fixture
